_comment: This is the ONE file in the whole system you touch manually — and only ~4x per year, when ASX rebalances the 300. Takes 2 minutes: find the latest constituent list (e.g. from the S&P/ASX 300 fact sheet at asx.com.au, or your broker's index page), update 'tickers' and 'names' below, commit, done. Everything else (prices, signals, dashboard) re-runs automatically on the next scheduled job.
_source: S&P/ASX 300 constituent list — replace this comment block, it's not read by the script
